rulings.Case Title: VIVIAN SU VS. 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 26, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANT 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: VIVIAN SU VS. 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 26, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANTS ARTHUR KEOWN, WENDY KEOWN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to causes of action for breach of contract, breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing, negligence, intentional and negligent misrepresentation is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action. Demurrer is overruled as to cause of action for unjust enrichment. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JFK JTOWER, L.P. VS. JUAN DE ANDA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 26, 2018, Line 6. PLAINTIFF JFK JTOWER, L.P.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: DELWIN M. BLACKMAN III VS. TAMARA CARLIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 26, 2018, Line 7. DEFENDANT TAMARA CARLIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states sufficient facts to support a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the Validation Notice is not sufficient in the format provided; that FDCPA Notices are strictly construed; or that "faulty" validation notice invalidates the unlawful detainer. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. PATRICIA TELLERIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 26, 2018, Line 8. DEFENDANTS EDUARDO ALVARADO, DEYSIS CARACHE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: HONG HAO WANG VS. KEVIN CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 26, 2018, Line 9. DEFENDANT KEVIN CHEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege his interest in the property, e.g. owner, master tenant, etc. CCP 430.41 is not applicable. CCP 430.41(d). =(501/SRB)
